# Legacy Sidebar Workspace Draft

This draft documents a superseded frontend layout.
The old settings sidebar exposed upload, new session, workspace navigation, tools, workflows and memory as equal top-level controls.
It also kept a permanent task-intent dropdown next to the composer.
That structure made ordinary learners understand implementation capabilities before they could simply continue learning.
The current product instead keeps Settings focused on learning experience and privacy, moves experimental capabilities out of the primary hierarchy, and exposes task intent only as an on-demand correction chip.
Do not use this legacy draft as the source of truth for the current Study Agent interface.
